description: MCM6 regulatory variant associated with lactase persistence and lactose intolerance. The -13910 C>T variant in the regulatory region upstream of the LCT gene affects lactase enzyme expression into adulthood.

source.title: Identification of a variant associated with adult-type hypolactasia
source.authors: Enattah NS, Sahi T, Savilahti E, et al.

GG.phenotype: Lactase non-persistence with high probability of adult lactose intolerance
GG.effect: Lactase non-persistence with high probability of adult lactose intolerance
GG.recommendation: Reduce or avoid dairy products; consider lactase supplements, lactose-free alternatives, or fermented dairy products

GA.phenotype: Partial lactase persistence; mild lactose intolerance possible
GA.effect: Partial lactase persistence; mild lactose intolerance possible
GA.recommendation: May tolerate some dairy; individual tolerance varies; trial and error approach recommended

AG.phenotype: Partial lactase persistence; mild lactose intolerance possible
AG.effect: Partial lactase persistence; mild lactose intolerance possible
AG.recommendation: May tolerate some dairy; individual tolerance varies; trial and error approach recommended

AA.phenotype: Lactase persistence; able to digest dairy throughout life
AA.effect: Lactase persistence; able to digest dairy throughout life
AA.recommendation: No dietary restrictions related to lactose; normal dairy consumption is tolerable
